subject: [PATCH v4 1/8] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

reviews.author: Liam R. Howlett
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.

2026-05-21.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the list_lru locking mechanism by removing unnecessary NULL checks in certain callers. The current implementation checks for NULL returns from lock_list_lru_of_memcg() but this is not necessary as acquiring the lock will never fail.
